differential_diagnoses: Viral pneumonia with secondary bacterial superinfection
Autoimmune myositis presenting as a crisis
next_steps: Perform autoimmune myositis panel (including anti-Jo-1, anti-SRP, and anti-HMGCR)
Order Leptospira IgM and PCR testing
Obtain specialized toxicology screen for heavy metals or adulterants in herbal supplements
Perform bedside transthoracic echocardiogram to rule out cardiomyopathy
